message:
tests: provider factory Api/KnownProvider/ModelCost coverage

New test coverage for provider types:

Api round-trip tests:
- api_display_and_from_str_round_trip: verifies all Api variants
  serialize to expected strings and parse back correctly
- api_from_str_empty_rejected: confirms empty string is rejected

KnownProvider round-trip tests:
- known_provider_display_and_from_str_round_trip: verifies all
  KnownProvider variants serialize and parse correctly
- known_provider_from_str_empty_rejected: confirms empty is rejected

ModelCost calculation tests:
- model_calculate_cost_zero_is_zero: zero tokens = zero cost
- model_calculate_cost_matches_per_million_rates: verifies cost
  calculation uses per-million token rates correctly

Test infrastructure:
- make_model_with_cost helper: creates Model with specified costs
- Imports: Api, CacheRetention, KnownProvider, StreamOptions, FromStr

These tests ensure the type system correctly handles provider/API
identifiers across configuration, CLI, and runtime boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
